overall.description: Static shot of a gothic-style castle bedroom interior from a video game, featuring stone arch ceilings, an ornate wrought-iron fireplace with glowing embers, and a four-poster bed with green drapery. The scene is lit by warm firelight and wall sconces, creating an atmospheric medieval chamber.

dark wooden bed with heavy green velvet curtains and draped canopy
pointed stone arch forming the vaulted ceiling structure
lit wall-mounted lamp with warm yellow glow and glass enclosure
small wooden furniture piece or step stool in the foreground

segments.scene_description: A static view of a gothic castle bedroom illuminated by firelight. The ornate wrought-iron fireplace glows with embers at center, while a four-poster bed with green drapery sits against the back wall beneath stone arches. A wall sconce provides additional warm lighting on the right, and a small wooden stool sits in the foreground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric gaze upon a gothic castle bedroom bathed in the warm, flickering glow of firelight. It begins with a focus on the ornate wrought-iron fireplace at the center, where glowing embers cast deep shadows across the stone floor. As the eye wanders deeper into the chamber, the view encompasses a four-poster bed with heavy green drapery resting beneath the weight of massive stone arches. The scene then expands to include a wall sconce providing a soft amber light on the right, before finally settling on a small wooden stool positioned in the quiet foreground.
